headline: Ariel Investments Small Cap Value Q2 2026 Portfolio Activity
summary: Ariel Small Cap Value Tax-Exempt Composite advanced +17.19% gross of fees (+17.04% net of fees) in the quarter. Read more here.

headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks to Research Further and 1 That Underwhelm
summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.
